summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Credits deduction system. All 13 tests passed (100%). Verified: login, balance endpoint, credit deduction for all AI actions (1, 2, 3, 5 credits), history tracking, 402 error handling, and trial_days=7.
passed_tests: GET /api/ai-credits/balance returns balance with total/used/available - SUCCESS
POST /api/ai/insights deducts 1 credit and returns credits_used: 1 - SUCCESS
POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/risk-analysis deducts 5 credits and returns credits_used: 5 - SUCCESS
POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/consistency-alerts deducts 5 credits and returns credits_used: 5 - SUCCESS
GET /api/ai-credits/history shows all deduction actions with timestamps - SUCCESS
402 error returned when credits insufficient with message 'Créditos insuficientes...' - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Reset demo user credits to 100 after testing depleted them to 0
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Credits deduction system fully tested and working. All AI endpoints now deduct credits before processing and return credits_used in response. 402 error is returned when credits are insufficient. Demo user has 100 credits available. History endpoint tracks all credit changes with action type, credits amount (negative for deductions), and timestamp.
